title: Aureline review-workspace-state (header / checks-strip / approval-publish-sheet / stack-strip) vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the review-workspace-state record family frozen in docs/vcs/hosted_review_and_merge_policy_contract.md. One review_workspace_state_record pins a workspace's header strip (head / base refs and head / base drift), the checks / evaluation strip (a list of cells, each citing one review_evaluation_result_record plus one strip_cell_authority_class so a missing evaluator publishes a typed not_evaluated_on_this_surface cell rather than disappear into a green-by-omission view), the approval / publish sheet (a list of approval cells citing one approval_strip_state_class plus an approval_ticket_ref required on provider-authoritative and publish-later-queued states and forbidden on draft-only-local and provider-unreachable states; the sheet itself names a publish_sheet_publication_state_class that MUST match the cells), and the stack / dependency strip (a list of upstream patch_stack_member references plus a stack_strip_dependency_state_class so a downstream entry inherits the upstream block reason rather than re-deriving one). Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw comment bodies, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema. The eventual hosted-review-state crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, header drift class, strip-cell authority class, approval-strip state class, publish-sheet publication state class, stack-strip dependency state class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps review_workspace_state_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

review_workspace_state_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the review-workspace-state vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw comment bodies, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the workspace-state row was minted under.

drift_class.description: Frozen drift-class vocabulary used on the head and base drift cells. fresh_no_drift = the ref matches its captured snapshot; drifted_within_grace = the ref drifted but is still inside the grace window; drifted_beyond_grace_re_evaluate = the ref drifted past the grace window and re-evaluation is required before any mutation-class action is admitted; drift_unverifiable_provider_unreachable = the provider is unreachable and drift cannot be verified, so the chip surfaces 'unverifiable' rather than 'fresh'.

strip_cell_authority_class.description: Frozen strip-cell-authority vocabulary. Matches the inbox-state vocabulary so a downstream surface that lifts a cell into the inbox row does not need to translate. provider_authoritative = the cell's evaluation result was published by the provider; local_parity_estimate = the cell's result was published by a local / CI / AI evaluator that the surface treats as a local parity estimate of the provider's authority; stale_relative_to_base_or_head = the cell's result was pinned to a base / head identity that has drifted and re-evaluation is required; not_evaluated_on_this_surface = no evaluator on this surface published a result for this check class (the cell is typed so a missing evaluator does not disappear into a green-by-omission view); draft_only_no_provider_state = the cell is a local draft (e.g. the actor opened a workspace they have not yet published to a provider) and there is no provider state to compare against.

approval_strip_state_class.description: Frozen approval-strip vocabulary. provider_authoritative_approved / _changes_requested / _dismissed = the approval crossed the wire and the provider holds the authoritative state; draft_only_local_pending_publish = the actor authored an approval / changes-request / dismissal locally that has not been published; publish_later_queued = the actor has explicitly queued the local approval for publish-later; provider_unreachable_local_continues = the provider is unreachable and the local approval is held until the next sync, with no publish-later commitment.

publish_sheet_publication_state_class.description: Frozen publish-sheet-level publication-state vocabulary. publish_sheet_synced_with_provider = every approval cell on the sheet is provider-authoritative; publish_sheet_draft_only_local = at least one cell is draft-only-local-pending-publish and none are publish-later-queued; publish_sheet_publish_later_queued = at least one cell is publish-later-queued; publish_sheet_export_only_no_provider_publish = the sheet's underlying workspace is imported-bundle / browser-handoff / provider-outage with no publish-later admissible — only export is admissible.

stack_strip_dependency_state_class.description: Frozen stack-strip dependency-state vocabulary. _admissible_member_landed = the upstream member landed cleanly; _pending_upstream_member_not_yet_landed = the upstream member has not landed yet but is not blocked; _blocked_upstream_member_blocked = the upstream member is blocked and the downstream entry inherits the block; _drifted_upstream_member_re_evaluation_required = the upstream member drifted and the downstream entry MUST re-evaluate; _superseded_upstream_member_superseded = the upstream member was superseded by a rewrite and the downstream entry MUST re-pin to the successor.

review_workspace_state_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen review-workspace-state lifecycle vocabulary. publish_pending_provider_round_trip is the explicit state for workspaces whose draft approvals or publish-later actions are queued for the next provider sync.

review_workspace_state_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the review_workspace_state audit stream.

review_workspace_state_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the review_workspace_state stream. review_workspace_state_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a review_workspace_state_denial_reason.

head_branch_or_worktree_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/vcs/branch_row.schema.json or schemas/vcs/worktree_row.schema.json for the head ref. Raw branch names and raw absolute paths never appear here.

base_branch_or_worktree_ref.description: Opaque ref into the git-state contract for the base ref.

head_revision_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the head revision the workspace was opened against.

base_revision_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the base revision.

header_strip.description: Header-strip carrying the bound head / base refs and their drift classes.

review_evaluation_result_id_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/vcs/review_evaluation_result.schema.json. Required (non-null) when strip_cell_authority_class is provider_authoritative, local_parity_estimate, or stale_relative_to_base_or_head; null when the cell's authority class is not_evaluated_on_this_surface or draft_only_no_provider_state. The cell never duplicates the result row's fields.

review_pack_check_class_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the review_pack_check_descriptor row this cell evaluates against. Used by the strip surface to route a not_evaluated_on_this_surface cell back to the missing check class.

allOf.description: review_evaluation_result_id_ref is required (non-null) when strip_cell_authority_class is provider_authoritative, local_parity_estimate, or stale_relative_to_base_or_head; null when the authority class is not_evaluated_on_this_surface or draft_only_no_provider_state.

checks_strip_cell.description: One row in the checks / evaluation strip. The strip surface MUST publish a typed not_evaluated_on_this_surface cell rather than omit a missing evaluator; the absence of a cell for a declared check class is the green-by-omission failure mode.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json. Required (non-null) when approval_strip_state_class is provider_authoritative_approved / _changes_requested / _dismissed or publish_later_queued; null when the state is draft_only_local_pending_publish or provider_unreachable_local_continues. A row that mismatches denies with approval_strip_publish_must_cite_approval_ticket or approval_strip_publish_state_must_match_authority_class.

approving_actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approving identity. Required (non-null); raw author identity strings never appear here.

provider_published_at.description: Required (non-null) when the approval crossed the wire (any provider_authoritative_* state). Null on draft-only-local and provider-unreachable-local-continues states. A draft-only or publish-later-queued cell that carries a non-null provider_published_at denies with approval_strip_publish_state_must_match_authority_class.

allOf.description: approval_ticket_ref is required (non-null) when approval_strip_state_class is one of the provider_authoritative_* states or publish_later_queued.
provider_published_at MUST be non-null when approval_strip_state_class is one of the provider_authoritative_* states; MUST be null otherwise.

approval_strip_cell.description: One row in the approval / publish sheet. Offline-captured approvals, publish-later queued approvals, and provider-authoritative approvals are mechanically distinguishable through the state class.

upstream_patch_stack_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json patch_stack_record. Used when the stack-strip cell pins a member that lives in a different patch stack than the workspace's primary stack.

upstream_patch_stack_member_id_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json patch_stack_member_record. The stack-strip cell never duplicates the member row's ordinal or landing state.

stack_strip_cell.description: One row in the stack / dependency strip.

review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the review_workspace_record (schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json) this state row is the header / strip / sheet view of.

checks_strip_cells.description: Ordered list of checks / evaluation strip cells. MAY be empty on a freshly opened workspace before any evaluator has reported, but every declared check class on the bound review_pack MUST eventually appear as a cell (even if as not_evaluated_on_this_surface).

approval_strip_cells.description: Ordered list of approval / publish-sheet cells.

stack_strip_cells.description: Ordered list of stack / dependency strip cells. MAY be empty when the workspace is not part of a stack.

linked_work_item_refs.description: Optional list of opaque refs into schemas/work_items/work_item_detail.schema.json.

linked_review_pack_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/vcs/review_pack.schema.json. Cited so the strip surface can route a not_evaluated_on_this_surface cell back to the declared check class.

merge_queue_entry_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/vcs/merge_queue_entry.schema.json when the workspace has an active queue entry.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when review_workspace_state_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

merge_policy_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge-policy resolver. Currently always null.

allOf.description: publish_sheet_publication_state_class = publish_sheet_synced_with_provider MUST NOT carry any approval_strip_cell whose state is draft_only_local_pending_publish, publish_later_queued, or provider_unreachable_local_continues.
publish_sheet_publication_state_class = publish_sheet_publish_later_queued MUST carry at least one approval_strip_cell whose state is approval_strip_state_publish_later_queued.
publish_sheet_publication_state_class = publish_sheet_export_only_no_provider_publish MUST NOT carry any provider_authoritative_* approval cell.
archived_at is required (non-null) when review_workspace_state_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone and MUST be null otherwise.

review_workspace_state_record.description: Row shape consumed by review-workspace surfaces, hosted-review readers, AI review-aware overlays, and support / export. Exactly one row per review-workspace identity per surface.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is review_workspace_state_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

review_workspace_state_audit_event_recor.description: Audit-event row on the review_workspace_state stream.
